positive: Stylized, graphic illustration of a majestic, roaring lion's head in a tribal tattoo flash style. The lion's mane should feature bold, geometric patterns and flowing, ornate lines, contrasted against clean, solid black fill areas. Central composition, symmetry emphasized. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo blue, burnt orange, and stark black on a clean white background. Minimal background elements to maximize print versatility. High contrast, clean lines, vector graphic quality, stencil art aesthetic, bold silhouettes, perfect symmetry, designed for apparel transfer.
